title: Modi Govt’s ‘Gift’ To J&K: Vande Bharat Extended To Jammu Tawi, Coaches Increased To 20
description: Union Minister Jitendra Singh confirmed the Srinagar-Katra Vande Bharat will run up to Jammu Tawi from April 30 with coaches increased from 8 to 20, adding winterisation tech to boost tourism, connectivity and comfort in J&K.
